GoalOS RSI TheatreLoop → governance → dossier
ConciergeCommand CenterLoop ReactorLoop → RSIConstitutionEvidenceLegalInstitution
From agent loop to sovereign invention governance

A loop can restart.
RSI must govern what improves.

Run a public-safe demonstration of the transition from long-running agent loops to deterministic RSI governance: exploration is allowed, outcome authority is mechanical, promotion requires evidence, compounding requires persistence, and autonomy requires authority.

No account. No form. No wallet. No token approval. No network request. No cookies. No analytics. No browser storage. No transaction broadcast. No production authority. No user data wanted.

Deterministic governance core
RSIgoverned loop
TargetEmitFilterAtlasTestEvalInsertPromote
0cycle
E0ECI
0.00advantage
DENYauthority
01 · Mission preset

OMNI-style interestingness can allocate exploration pressure here, but it never grants insertion, promotion, settlement, or production authority.

02 · Pipeline rail
READY · outcome authority not granted

Target exploration pressure. No candidate has authority until gates pass.

  1. RSI theatre waiting for a mandate.
03 · Evidence Contact Index
rsi_state.jsoncycle_index: 0 · archive: append-only · authority: deny
eci_ledger.jsonlE0 simulated evidence only; confidence capped.
baseline_comparison.jsonNo advantage without comparator.
dossier_index.mdNo Move-37 dossier has been packaged.
04 · Mechanical gates
05 · Move-37 control

High novelty raises skepticism.

A surprising candidate is not a breakthrough until it survives reproduction, shock tests, persistence gates, replay, and dossier review.

Recognizenovelty + advantage thresholds
Reproducefixed seeds + artifact hashes
Stress-testpolicy shocks + deltas
Persistenceadvantage survives shocks
Dossierpublic-safe summary + private appendix boundary
06 · Outcome authority

Authority withheld

Search control may suggest where to look next. It cannot admit, settle, or deploy a candidate.

Accepted inserts0
Quarantines0
Stress passes0
Dossiers0
From Loop to RSI

The loop is a procedure. RSI is a governed improvement institution.

Loop

Restart from state

The loop writes contract, progress, trace, and bottleneck files so work survives context loss.

RSI

Hard-stop on drift

State, prompt pack, runner config, archive, atlas, ECI, and ledgers cannot silently mutate.

Loop

Read traces

Failures become legible and the next bottleneck becomes visible.

RSI

Promote only with proof

A candidate advances only after risk, evidence, baseline, replay, persistence, and validator gates.

Loop

Delete harness

Scaffold is reduced when it stops adding value.

RSI

Package breakthroughs

Move-37 claims become dossiers: reproduction, stress tests, evidence objects, and replay instructions.

Claim boundary

This is a public-safe architecture demonstration, not empirical proof of achieved RSI.

The page does not claim achieved AGI, ASI, superintelligence, empirical SOTA, external audit completion, production certification, autonomous sovereignty, or live invention authority. Stronger claims require real tasks, baseline comparisons, executed evidence, replayable ProofBundles, safety/cost ledgers, validator reports, delayed outcomes, and independent review.

LoopStateTraceECIBaselineStressDossierChronicleCapability
